description_long: This is a sleek, low-profile red sports car with an aggressive aerodynamic design and a sharply contoured hood featuring a black vent. The front end is characterized by angular LED headlights and a prominent emblem on the nose. The side profile reveals sculpted doors, black side mirrors, and large black alloy wheels with low-profile tires, as well as air vents behind the front wheels. The rear showcases quad exhaust pipes, a subtle integrated spoiler, and distinctive taillights. The roofline is smoothly curved, and the windows are tinted, giving the car a modern, high-performance appearance. The overall build suggests a lightweight yet sturdy construction, typical of high-end sports cars.
description: A striking red sports car with black accents, sculpted bodywork, and large black alloy wheels, featuring aggressive front and rear styling.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sharp headlights, black hood vent, and prominent emblem on the nose.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sculpted doors, black side mirrors, and large black wheels with visible brake calipers.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the quad exhaust pipes, integrated spoiler, and distinctive taillights.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the aerodynamic lines, black wheels, and side air vent.
